description: A supplier sends back an acknowledgement for a purchase order, but with a different delivery date than requested.

nodes.task_description: Receive the PO acknowledgement from the supplier.
Compare the acknowledged details with the original PO.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent notices the delivery date has been pushed back by two weeks.

nodes.task_description: Update the expected delivery date for the PO in the system.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent updates the ETA for the PO.

nodes.task_description: Decide whether to accept the new date or try to negotiate a better one with the supplier.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent accepts the new date as it does not critically impact any customer orders.
